auditor.summary: The generated code provides a solid architectural foundation for the universal empty state system, with a well-structured DataState component, centralized configuration registry, and proper empty state handling in ProcurementTable.tsx. However, the implementation has critical buildability issues that prevent it from passing: (1) @heroicons/react is imported but not in package.json dependencies, (2) the `any` type is used for dynamic icon resolution, (3) the telemetry integration is incomplete (console.log placeholder), and (4) only 1 of 26 modified files is provided, making it impossible to verify full compliance with the directive's scope. The code also has WCAG contrast ratio concerns and missing test files. The build cannot be shipped in its current state.

top_issues.description: Imports @heroicons/react/24/outline which is NOT listed in the installed packages (package.json dependencies). This will cause a build failure as the module cannot be resolved.
Uses `(HeroIcons as any)[finalIcon]` which introduces `any` type, violating the BUILDABILITY constraint that TypeScript file additions must not introduce `any`.

Telemetry implementation uses console.log as placeholder with comment 'Real implementation would call: telemetry.track(event)'. This does not satisfy the audit requirement for immutable audit log capture.

log: [RECOVERY] AUTO-003 stuck in_progress for >30min — reset to pending (attempt #2)
